column2: Three redacted Massachusetts IEP documents were used only to infer schema/domain patterns; no real student identifiers are included.
All names, IDs, dates, contacts, and specific personal details are synthetic.
QA/testing, data-model validation, RAG demos, dashboard prototyping, and synthetic workflow testing.
Not a substitute for clinical, legal, educational, or compliance review.
Synthetic primary key for joining all sheets.
Number of sessions or service occurrences per week.
Mock status values for testing dashboards only.
